_comment: Copy this file to config.json and fill in your values. See README.md.
_printMode_help: network = send ZPL to the printer's IP (recommended). windows = send via the installed Windows driver. folder = hand off to ZebraDesigner Automation.
_windows_mode: Used when printMode = windows. Run `Get-Printer` in PowerShell to find the exact name.
_folder_mode: Used when printMode = folder. Point ZebraDesigner Automation at this same folder.
